text: The minimalism and clarity of the first space feel almost clinical—a quiet, somewhat sterile passage that urges reflection on order and emptiness. When I stand before the vibrant 'R+D' wall in the second image, I become conscious of curiosity and forward motion. Here, experimentation and learning are displayed as the highest virtues. It’s a juxtaposition of tranquil preparation and inspired creation. I feel as though I’m at an intersection of potential—between silent anticipation and the dynamic pulse of ideas.
